---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A concise description of what you'd like.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What's your use case?

## Proposed Solution

How you'd expect it to work. This can be rough — a CLI flag, a UI change, a new output field, etc.

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds you've tried or other approaches you considered.
